claim: YOLO demand router PRD readiness inspection includes blocking logic for evidence agents that report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, or block status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function independently verified: checks missing.length > 0 (line 496) adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker; checks clarify/block in recommendation/verdict/status (line 503) adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker.
evidence.why: Core blocking logic converts evidence agent missing/clarify/block recommendations into PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness function independently verified: iterates required evidence roles (line 710), checks evidenceResultComplete for each (line 713), calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each result (line 721), and accumulates all blockers into blockerList.
evidence.why: Shows how blocking issues from evidence agents flow into the final blocker list that determines PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: prd_ready computed as blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker (including EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED, or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED) results in prd_ready false.
evidence.why: Final decision logic confirms blocking behavior prevents readiness.

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem function independently verified: filters status notes like 'no missing data identified', 'no conflicts', '100% agreement' using regex patterns to prevent them from being treated as missing blockers.
evidence.why: Distinguishes between status notes and actual missing data.

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems function independently verified: filters missing array through isNonMissingStatusItem to remove status notes before checking if missing.length > 0.
evidence.why: Ensures only real missing data triggers blockers, not status messages.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' independently verified: cross-checker returns missing array and recommendation: clarify, test expects prd_ready false and EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker.
evidence.why: Proves system correctly blocks readiness on missing/clarify recommendations.

evidence.summary: Test case 'cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result' independently verified: missing cross-checker or verifier results each add EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers and prevent prd_ready true.
evidence.why: Validates incomplete evidence agent participation blocks readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence conflicts and existing blockers prevent PRD readiness' independently verified: conflicting recommendations (proceed vs block) trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blocker and prevent readiness.
evidence.why: Validates conflict handling prevents readiness when agents disagree.

evidence.summary: Test case 'non-missing status notes in missing arrays do not block readiness' independently verified: status notes like 'No missing data identified' and 'All required evidence tasks completed' in missing arrays don't prevent readiness.

risks: Evidence agent implementations must use standard recommendation values (proceed, clarify, block) or verdict values (pass, blocked, fail) to trigger blockers; non-standard values might bypass blocking logic.
Edge case: status normalization relies on specific string patterns; if agents return creative status messages not covered by the clarify/block check, blockers might not trigger.

result.notes: Independent cross-check confirms all evidence cited by explorer is accurate. Core blocking logic in evidenceResultBlockingIssues correctly adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED, and EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blockers. Test cases validate the blocking behavior works for missing, clarify, block, and conflict scenarios. No contradictions found between explorer claims and source code.
